The '''''Sceltor''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. ''Sceltor'' participated in the capture of space station [[RS-32]]. It also fell into an ambush at the space station's location, but [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] helped it escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
